name: Heethr
description: Snow melting platform — backend, dashboard & shop

lifecycle.restart: zsh ~/.scripts/close_heethr.sh && zsh ~/.scripts/close_heethr_browser.sh && sleep 1 && zsh ~/.scripts/launch_project.sh ~/.scripts/projects/heethr.json && zsh ~/.scripts/heethr-agentdeck.sh ensure && zsh ~/.scripts/launch_heethr_browser.sh
